hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude terminó la tarea" with title "LiciTrack"'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20); if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TypeScript errors detectados:\n%s"}}' "$RESULT"; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [ -f "$f" ]; then ISSUES=""; if grep -qn 'NextResponse\.json' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}NextResponse.json encontrado en $f — debe usar Response.json()
"; fi; if grep -qn "'use server'" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}'use server' encontrado en $f — este proyecto NO usa Server Actions
"; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PATRONES PROHIBIDOS:
%s"}}' "$ISSUES"; fi; fi; }
